items.title:
AI 的能力天然是锯齿状的：有的地方锋利，有的地方缺口。脚手架的作用是补齐缺口，让产出稳定。

但模型一迭代，锯齿的形状就变了。旧脚手架补的是旧缺口，新版本上那个位置可能已经长出了能力。你的脚手架反而...

items.title: As AI transforms white-collar work, executives across sectors say trust, not AI, is the key differentiator where accuracy, accountability, and regulation matter (Financial Times)
items.title_original: As AI transforms white-collar work, executives across sectors say trust, not AI, is the key differentiator where accuracy, accountability, and regulation matter (Financial Times)
items.title_en: As AI transforms white-collar work, executives across sectors say trust, not AI, is the key differentiator where accuracy, accountability, and regulation matter (Financial Times)
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能改变白领工作，各行业的高管表示，信任，而不是人工智能，才是关键的差异化因素，其中准确性、问责制和监管至关重要（《金融时报》）
items.title_bilingual: 随着人工智能改变白领工作，各行业的高管表示，信任，而不是人工智能，才是关键的差异化因素，其中准确性、问责制和监管至关重要（《金融时报》） / As AI transforms white-collar work, executives across sectors say trust, not AI, is the key differentiator where accuracy, accountability, and regulation matter (Financial Times)
